heading: Strengthening democracy, tolerance, and the development of civil society
label: 2296d Strengthening democracy, tolerance, and the development of civil society
notes: Delegation of FunctionsFor delegation of functions of President under this section, see Ex. Ord. No. 12163, , 44 F.R. 56673, as amended, set out as a note under .Sept. 29, 1979section 2381 of this title
amendments: Delegation of FunctionsFor delegation of functions of President under this section, see Ex. Ord. No. 12163, , 44 F.R. 56673, as amended, set out as a note under .Sept. 29, 1979section 2381 of this title

children.heading: Purpose of assistance
children.label: a Purpose of assistance
children.text: The purpose of assistance under this section is to promote institutions of democratic government and to create the conditions for the growth of pluralistic societies, including religious tolerance and respect for internationally recognized human rights.
Assistance for democracy building, including programs to strengthen parliamentary institutions and practices.
Assistance for the development of nongovernmental organizations.
Assistance for development of independent media.
Assistance for the development of the rule of law, a strong independent judiciary, and transparency in political practice and commercial transactions.
International exchanges and advanced professional training programs in skill areas central to the development of civil society.
Assistance to promote increased adherence to civil and political rights under .section 2151n(e) of this title

children.heading: Activities supported
children.label: c Activities supported
children.text: Activities that may be supported by assistance under subsection (b) include activities that are designed to advance progress toward the development of democracy.
